title: Unique 20911 Birthday Banner - 1.82 m - LOL Surprise Party, Multicolour
features: Ideal for decorating a LOL Surprise birthday party
Hang on a wall or a photo booth backdrop
Combine with other LOL Surprise party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Deck out your kids party with our totally cool LOL Surprise Birthday Banner. Measuring 1.8 metres long, this charming birthday banner features adorable LOL Surprise babies like Kitty Queen, Diva, and Miss Baby. Little guests will love seeing their favourite characters decorating your child's LOL Surprise birthday party. You can hang this banner on a bare wall, across a mantelpiece, or along a staircase to create an impressive party atmosphere. Get ready to party all day with more LOL Surprise themed party supplies. Safety Warning CAUTION: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only.
